parts.text: Execute the pipeline on 'test_sales' data from 'last_week'. 1. Fetch from cache. 2. Validate and clean (handle nulls). 3. Filter out 'Cancelled' shipments. 4. Transform by 'region' aggregating 'amount'. 5. Generate a bar chart. 6. Compose a detailed HTML report. 7. Export as 'final_report'. 8. Email to tejashvikumawat@gmail.com.
